name: rc505mk2
description: Browse FX racks, build memory configs, and upload to your Boss RC-505mk2 via USB.
long_description:
Local assistant for the Boss RC-505mk2 loop station (https://www.boss.info/us/products/rc-505mk2/). Browse bundled FX modules and rack presets, compose custom racks, generate RC0 memory files, and upload directly to your device — no cloud, no API keys.

Connect your RC-505 in USB Storage mode (MENU → USB → STORAGE → CONNECT) before using device tools.

Official docs: Owner's Manual https://static.roland.com/assets/media/pdf/RC-505mk2_eng02_W.pdf · Parameter Guide https://static.roland.com/assets/media/pdf/RC-505mk2_Parameter_eng02_W.pdf

Not affiliated with Boss, Roland Corporation, or Anthropic.

prompts.name: load-rack-to-slot
prompts.description: Load a bundled FX rack to a device memory slot
prompts.text: Load an RC-505mk2 FX rack to memory slot ${arguments.slot}. Use list_rack_presets to find a match, then upload_memory with rack_id. Device must be in USB Storage mode.

prompts.name: adapt-genre-rack
prompts.description: Create or adapt an FX rack for a genre or style
prompts.text: Create an RC-505mk2 FX rack for ${arguments.genre} performance. Use list_rack_presets filtered by genre or tag, adapt if needed, and offer upload.

prompts.name: build-custom-rack
prompts.description: Build a greenfield FX rack from modules
prompts.text: Build a custom RC-505mk2 FX rack from scratch: ${arguments.description}. Use list_fx_modules for IFX and TFX, then create_rack_preset with fxModuleIds. Do not browse bundled rack presets.

prompts.name: check-device
prompts.description: Check if the RC-505mk2 is connected via USB
prompts.text: Check if my Boss RC-505mk2 is connected. Use detect_device. Remind me to enable USB Storage mode if not detected.
